defs: variant of 隻|只[zhi1]
only; merely; just
only; merely; nothing but; no more than
it's just that ...

pinyin: zhi3 ke3 yi4 hui4 , bu4 ke3 yan2 chuan2
defs: can be understood, but not described (idiom, from Zhuangzi 莊子|庄子[Zhuang1 zi3]); mysterious and subtle
to have no other option but to ...; to have to; to be forced to
to have no alternative but to; to be obliged to
I'm afraid that...
perhaps
maybe
very likely
merely; only; just; nothing but
simply
but; however
only have ...; there is only ...
(used in combination with 才[cai2]) it is only if ... (that one can ...) (as in 只有通過治療才能痊愈|只有通过治疗才能痊愈[zhi3 you3 tong1 guo4 zhi4 liao2 cai2 neng2 quan2 yu4] "the only way to cure it is with therapy")
it is only (someone) who ... (as in 只有男性才有此需要[zhi3 you3 nan2 xing4 cai2 you3 ci3 xu1 yao4] "only men would have such a requirement")
(used to express lack of alternatives) can only; have no choice but to (as in 只有屈服[zhi3 you3 qu1 fu2] "the only thing you can do is give in")
all we need is an east wind (idiom); lacking only one tiny crucial item
to only need
it only takes
see 只爭朝夕|只争朝夕[zhi3 zheng1 zhao1 xi1]
(idiom) to seize every minute; to make the best use of one's time
(coll.) to take (sth) as …; to treat as …; to assume; to act as if …
Taiwan pr. [zhi3dang1]

pinyin: zhi3 zhi1 qi2 yi1 , bu4 zhi1 qi2 er4
defs: to know the first, but not know the second (idiom); only partial information
solely engrossed in one thing
just (one thing, no need to worry about the rest)
simply
by all means
please feel free
do not hesitate (to ask for sth)
can only
obliged to do sth
to have no other choice
so long as; provided; if

trad: 只要功夫深，鐵杵磨成針
simp: 只要功夫深，铁杵磨成针
pinyin: zhi3 yao4 gong1 fu5 shen1 , tie3 chu3 mo2 cheng2 zhen1
defs: If you work at it hard enough, you can grind an iron bar into a needle.
cf idiom 磨杵成針|磨杵成针, to grind an iron bar down to a fine needle (idiom); fig. to persevere in a difficult task
to study diligently
to see (the same thing) over and over again
to see, to one's surprise, (sth happen suddenly)

pinyin: zhi3 jian4 shu4 mu4 , bu4 jian4 sen1 lin2
defs: can't see the wood for the trees
(idiom) just a word or two; a few isolated phrases

trad: 只許州官放火，不許百姓點燈
simp: 只许州官放火，不许百姓点灯
pinyin: zhi3 xu3 zhou1 guan1 fang4 huo3 , bu4 xu3 bai3 xing4 dian3 deng1
defs: only the official is allowed to light the fire
Gods may do what cattle may not
quod licet Iovi, non licet bovi
to be all talk and no action
(computing) read-only
to be limited to
to focus solely on; to pay attention only to; to be preoccupied with
